regions.name: Rio de Janeiro
regions.stay_type: boutique hotel in Santa Teresa or Ipanema

activities.category: Christ the Redeemer and Corcovado sunrise visit
Favela community tour with local guide
Day beach rotation — Ipanema, Prainha, Grumari

regions.name: Pantanal (southern sector)
regions.stay_type: working farm lodge (fazenda) with wildlife-focused activities

activities.category: Jaguar-tracking boat safari on the Cuiabá River
Dawn birdwatching — world's highest bird diversity
Chapada Diamantina canyon and waterfall day trip

common_mistakes: Visiting the Pantanal in the wet season (December–March) when road access closes and wildlife disperses — July to October is the dry window when jaguars concentrate near the river
Booking accommodation in Centro Rio instead of Santa Teresa or Ipanema — proximity and vibe matter enormously here
Treating Salvador as just an overnight — the Pelourinho at night and the Afro-Brazilian museum circuit need two full days
Flying to Cuiabá without checking road conditions to the northern Pantanal fazendas — the last 100km can be impassable in transitional seasons

regions.name: Manaus gateway & Rio Negro
regions.stay_type: city hotel near the historic opera house

activities.category: Amazonian Opera House tour and local market
Meeting of the Waters boat tour

regions.name: Amazon jungle lodge (Rio Negro or Mamirauá)
regions.stay_type: floating lodge or elevated stilted camp deep in primary forest

activities.category: Canopy walkway and treetop ecology at dawn
River dolphin encounter and local fishing
Night canoe for caiman and night creatures

regions.name: Alter do Chão
regions.stay_type: charming pousada near the freshwater beaches

activities.category: Amazon freshwater beach at low-water season
Arapiuns River village visits by canoe

common_mistakes: Flying into Manaus for only 2 nights and calling it 'the Amazon' — you need at least 4 nights in a real jungle lodge to experience primary forest
Visiting Alter do Chão in the wet season (March–June) when the freshwater beaches are completely submerged
Choosing a lodge based on price alone — the difference between a basic camp and a well-run ecology lodge is the difference between seeing 20 species and 200
Not factoring in the Manaus domestic connection when booking international flights — the Manaus connection frequently delays
